The Husqvarna automatic lawn mower utilizes a combination of rotary motion and hydraulic energy harvesting to power the mower's motion. When a mower is in motion, some energy is directed to the blades at the front of the mower, reducing friction which allows the mower to drive forward. As the mower moves forward, more energy is directed to the rear of the mower, reducing friction and allowing the mower to attain a higher speed. This rotation-based energy harvesting process is continuously performed over time reducing the weight of the mower and increasing efficiency.
